title: Event
description: Represents an individual error occurrence, containing full exception details, stack traces, device information, and metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the event.

error_id.description: The identifier of the error group this event belongs to.

project_id.description: The identifier of the project this event belongs to.

error_class.description: The class or type of the error.

message.description: The error message for this event.

context.description: The context in which the error occurred.

severity.description: The severity level of this event.

user.description: Information about the user who experienced the error.

app.description: Information about the application where the error occurred.

device.description: Information about the device where the error occurred.

exceptions.description: The list of exceptions in this event.

breadcrumbs.description: The breadcrumb trail leading up to the error.

request.description: Information about the HTTP request during which the error occurred.

http_method.description: The HTTP method of the request.

meta_data.description: Custom metadata attached to the event.

received_at.description: The date and time the event was received by Bugsnag.

url.description: The API URL for this event resource.

html_url.description: The URL to the event on the Bugsnag dashboard.
